SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.diagnostics
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.telemetry.dto
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.dto.telemetry
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry
 
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
    Class
    Description
    TelemetryData
    The engine collects information about multiple aspects of the installation.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
    Class
    Description
    TelemetryData
    The engine collects information about multiple aspects of the installation.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.diagnostics
    Class
    Description
    Command
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about executed commands for telemetry data.
    Metric
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about certain internal metrics for telemetry data.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.telemetry used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.telemetry.dto
    Class
    Description
    ApplicationServer
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about the application server.
    Command
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about executed commands for telemetry data.
    Database
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about the connected database.
    Internals
    This class represents the structure of data describing Camunda internal metrics and the technical environment in which Camunda is set-up.
    Jdk
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about the installed Java runtime environment.
    LicenseKeyData
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about the license key issued for enterprise versions of Camunda Platform.
    Metric
    This class represents the data structure used for collecting information about certain internal metrics for telemetry data.
    Product
    This class represents the data structure of information about the Camunda product.
    TelemetryData
    The engine collects information about multiple aspects of the installation.
